Product Details
PDU Series

Pneumatic sealing profiles for reciprocating cylinder applications requiring low friction and reliable sealing.

← Back to Product Center

Industrial Product

PDU Series

Designed for pneumatic cylinders that need dependable sealing contact, low running resistance, and steady reciprocating performance.

PDU series profiles are often used in reciprocating pneumatic cylinders where sealing efficiency, wear balance, and service consistency are important for long-term operation.

Reciprocating Service

Suitable for cylinder applications with frequent reciprocating motion and continuous sealing contact.

Low Running Resistance

Helps reduce friction during cylinder travel while maintaining dependable air retention.

Stable Service Life

Supports practical wear performance and service consistency in routine pneumatic applications.
